testCases.name: Simple Order Aggregate
testCases.input: Create an Order aggregate with orderId as UUID and identity, customerName as text and required, totalAmount as decimal with minimum 0, status as text, and createdAt as datetime.

testCases.name: Order with Behaviors
testCases.input: Order aggregate with orderId UUID identity, customerName text required, items list of OrderItem, totalAmount decimal, status text. When placing order with customer and items: require that customer is not empty and items is not empty, calculate total as sum of items price, set status to PENDING, emit OrderPlaced with orderId.

testCases.name: Order with Temporal Validation and State Machine
testCases.input: Order aggregate with orderId UUID identity, customerName text required, status text default PENDING, createdAt datetime, expiresAt datetime. State machine for status: states are PENDING initial, CONFIRMED, DELIVERED final, CANCELLED final. Transitions: PENDING to CONFIRMED when payment received, CONFIRMED to DELIVERED always, any to CANCELLED always. When confirming order: require that status is PENDING and createdAt is more than 24 hours ago and payment is received, set status to CONFIRMED, emit OrderConfirmed with orderId.
